lastSession.summary: Added auto-run setup.sh from SessionStart hook — setup.sh now runs automatically when .claude-harness/ exists, applying migrations and creating missing state files transparently on plugin updates
completedTasks: Added setup.sh auto-run to session-start hook (after cache cleanup, before status gathering)
Bumped version to 10.0.3 in plugin.json and marketplace
nextSteps: Address pending features in active.json (feature-001 through feature-007)
feature-001: Add acceptanceCriteria to feature schema
feature-002: Add agentTeams and ATDD config sections

recentChanges: v10.0.3: Auto-run setup.sh from SessionStart hook for transparent migrations on plugin updates
v10.0.1: Fix autonomous archival (features not archived) and local branch cleanup (stale branches after merge)
v10.0.0: Separate marketplace, native plugin updates, cross-platform hooks, repo restructure
v9.3.0: ATDD Always-On — acceptance tests first in all modes, removed config gates
v9.2.0: Rich GitHub Issues from PRD — default issue creation, rich bodies, two-pass dependency linking
v9.1.0: Autonomous context isolation — subagent-per-feature delegation, memory continuity, team containment
v9.0.0: Agent Teams with ATDD — opt-in --team flag, 3 new hooks, Gherkin acceptance criteria
v8.4.0: Schema standardization — canonical schemas, version drift fixes, hook version cleanup
v8.1.0: Auto-update stale plugin cache from session-start hook
v8.0.0: Remove Agent Teams — direct implementation model
